✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

WebSockets: All 67 decls in the surface digest are unconditional (no #if conditions, no platform gaps). Manifest declares floors only for macOS/iOS/watchOS/tvOS; visionOS and macCatalyst rely on symbol presence alone, so their confidence is lowered. Only network.websockets is claimed: the package exposes no general HTTP client/server, gRPC, or other taxonomy capability at its public surface.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of websocket-kit? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
